nodes.name: 黑圆尾鹱
nodes.summary: 黑圆尾鹱（Mascarene petrel，学名 Pseudobulweria aterrima），分类上属于鹱形目，并归入鹱科，在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于留尼汪，主要威胁包括污染、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: 鹱科
nodes.summary: 鹱科（Procellariidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联74种鸟类，如南极鹱、Pintado petrel、Southern giant petrel等74种鸟类。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹱形目
nodes.summary: 鹱形目（Procellariiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联115种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等115种鸟类。

nodes.name: 留尼汪
nodes.summary: 留尼汪是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Malagasy turtle dove、斑姬地鸠、红尾热带鸟等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Also sometimes known as the Mascarene black petrel, this species was known from four specimens found in the nineteenth century on the island of Réunion

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Masacarene petrels are primarily monogamous. The species is classified as critically endangered as it is inferred from the number of records that there is an extremely small population threatened by introduced species, such as feral cats and house rats, and light pollution

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Masacarene petrels are primarily monogamous. The species is classified as critically endangered as it is inferred from the number of records that there is an extremely small population threatened by introduced species, such as feral cats and house rats, and light pollution
